target: 1. Ryunosuke Nagumo Returns to Hitogashima Island
July 22nd
Hizuru Minakata
Ugh…

(Oh no. 
This time really is bad…)

(My pen has stopped before, 
but this is nothing like before)

(No matter how I think, 
my thoughts just circle endlessly. 
This is a real slump…)
(I don't even know where to start anymore)

(Desperate to find a solution, I decided to return after years, 
but what could I possibly gain from that small island now?)

(It's possible that changing the environment 
would only make my thoughts more chaotic!)

(To be honest, returning because I'm stuck 
is too simple!!)

(No good! 
I didn't expect my thoughts to be this stuck! I'm ashamed of myself!!)
(Perhaps I should turn back…)

(No, I already contacted Ryunosuke. 
If I say I'm not going now, 
he'll make a big fuss over why!)
(Just thinking about it is already a hassle)

(Well, anyway. 
If I think of it as research for my next work, 
it won't be a waste)

(No, I can't afford it to be a waste. 
Getting out of this slump is urgent)

(I'll definitely find ideas for my next work 
with this return. 
Something to erase the fact that I made an easy decision…)
We will soon arrive at Hitogashima Island.

(Already? 
It passed by so quickly)

(No feelings of returning, but 
the scenery is still nice no matter how many times I see it…)

Thank you for riding. 
Please be careful as you disembark.

Ugh… 
This suitcase is heavy…

Ryunosuke's guy… 
As soon as he knew I was coming back, 
he demanded a bunch of souvenirs…

Saying that I should take them for him. 
Honestly…
Hm?

(That boy earlier. 
He's just standing there blankly…)

(He's stunned? 
Is there something so captivating in his view?)

(At the very least, 
I only see the peaceful scenery of this island)

(That boy is really strange. 
Back then and now…)
Ushio!!

(Who is this guy… What's the meaning of this action? 
Is he trying to suffocate himself by burying his face in my chest? 
That's original!)

(It seems he called out "Ushio", but 
how is this action related--)
H-huh… Nagumo-sensei!?
I… I'm alive…!!
What…?

(Given that he spoke while burying his face in my chest, 
he couldn't have been calling someone else in my sight)

(That means he called me "Nagumo-sensei". 
…That's impossible, why?)

Hey, kid… 
We've never met before, right?
Eh…?

T-that's…! 
Hizuru-san is, um, Nagumo-sensei… 
isn't she…!?
What…!
Why…! You know my identity!?

(This boy knows I'm "Ryunosuke Nagumo". 
But I don't know him)

(I haven't revealed my identity at all! 
If information leaked, it must be from Ryunosuke…)
(What a calculated timing…)
Hello?
Ah, older sister?

What's this confirmation? 
Who did you think you were calling?

Of course it's you, sister. 
Huh? You seem upset?

If you think that way, 
just treat it that way.
Yes, yes.

You're already at the port, right? 
I wanted to come pick you up, but I was late leaving.
Huh?

Wait five more minutes. 
See you later.

(The ferry's arrival time should have been known! 
Why are you acting late!!)

(And I didn't even ask you to come pick me up! 
Yet, why do I have to wait here!?)
This is unreasonable!

(…Huh? 
Where did that boy go?)

(He seems like a local here. 
We'll probably meet somewhere eventually)
(I'm worried about how he knew my identity…)

(But for now, I should prioritize my next work. 
If I don't get out of this slump--)

(Before thinking about how to be a writer, 
I'm already losing myself as a writer!)
